company.name: Beyond Horizon Technologies Sdn. Bhd.
company.tagline: Intelligent Asset Management Through Advanced Technology
company.description: Beyond Horizon Technologies is an asset intelligence technology company providing advanced solutions through UAV, robotics, LiDAR, 3D mapping and digital technologies to improve asset visibility, inspection efficiency and operational decision-making.
company.mission: To provide intelligent technology solutions that enhance asset management, inspection efficiency and operational reliability.
company.vision: To become a leading technology partner in digital transformation and intelligent asset management.
about: Beyond Horizon Technologies focuses on delivering innovative technology solutions for modern asset management challenges.
By integrating advanced hardware, intelligent software and data-driven workflows, we help organisations capture accurate information and make better decisions.

technology_focus.title: Smart Inspection
technology_focus.description: Advanced inspection technologies that improve safety, efficiency and data accuracy.

technology_focus.title: Robotics & Automation
technology_focus.description: Autonomous and robotic systems designed for challenging inspection environments.

technology_focus.title: Digital Mapping
technology_focus.description: LiDAR, 3D scanning and spatial data solutions for accurate digital documentation.

technology_focus.title: Asset Intelligence
technology_focus.description: Transforming collected data into actionable insights for better asset management.
